title: Persistent JSON library for persistent address space
description: pjson must provide a JSON-like API (similar to nlohmann::json) for working with JSON data structures stored in a persistent address space managed by PersistMemoryManager (pmm). All data persists across process restarts without explicit serialization/deserialization.
rationale: Applications need a convenient, familiar JSON API that works directly on persistent memory, eliminating the overhead of converting between in-memory and on-disk representations.
author: netkeep80
acceptance_criteria: Library provides API for creating, reading, updating, and deleting JSON values in persistent memory
Data survives process restarts without explicit save/load serialization
API is ergonomic and similar to nlohmann::json where applicable
